seo.title: Sandakkozhi Song Lyrics Ayitha Ezhuthu
seo.description: Full Sandakkozhi songs lyrics, Aayitha Ezhuthu Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Madhusree.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Aayitha Ezhuthu, AR Rahman, Madhusree, Sandakkozhi full lyrics, Aayitha Ezhuthu songs lyrics, Sandakkozhi lyrics snippets, Sandakkozhi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Sandakkozhi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sandakkozhi?

The song Sandakkozhi conveys themes of celebration and energy, reflecting the lively spirit of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Aayitha Ezhuthu related to this song?

This song is featured in Aayitha Ezhuthu, which revolves around the lives of three friends and their struggles, making the energetic vibe of the song a perfect fit for the film's themes.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Madhusree and composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was Sandakkozhi released?

Sandakkozhi was released on May 21, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sandakkozhi, the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the celebratory moments in Aayitha Ezhuthu. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The song captures the essence of friendship and the carefree spirit of youth, resonating with audiences. Madhusree's powerful vocals, combined with AR Rahman's dynamic composition, create an unforgettable musical experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sandakkozhi from Aayitha Ezhuthu is an electrifying track that showcases the incredible collaboration between the soulful voice of Madhusree and the genius of AR Rahman. This song perfectly captures the vibrant energy and spirit of celebration, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. Dive into the rhythmic beats and let the music take you on a joyous ride!
stanzaMeanings: This is a fight, a fight, just a little more, just a little more, this is my own fight.
I have my hands in my heart, my hands are trembling.
In your two eyes, if the fight comes, will it be a problem?
Just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh... just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh, just for a little while, what will happen to me?
If you take it, the bitter fruit will come, and if you give a kiss, the good path will lead to heaven.
Oh... even if it starts with a fight, let the bond grow like a circle in the stomach.
Just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh... just for a little while, what will happen to me?
This is a fight, a fight, just a little more, just a little more, this is my own fight.
I have my hands in my heart, my hands are trembling.
I don't want a house, just a tune is enough, I don't want anything else, just a little bit is enough.
The golden beetle of the nose is enough for the night, oh, if you give a kiss, I won't go away, I won't let the world go away.
Just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh... just for a little while, what will happen to me?
This is a fight, a fight, just a little more, just a little more, this is my own fight.
I have my hands in my heart, my hands are trembling.
In your two eyes, if the fight comes, will it be a problem?
Just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh... just for a little while, what will happen to me, oh, just for a little while, what will happen to me?
